summary: Vice President JD Vance delivering a podium speech to a 'Made in America' / workers audience, recounting the State of the Union and attacking congressional Democrats for not standing for a girl wounded by an 'illegal alien criminal.' All frames are the same static podium shot (presidential seal, hardhats and 'MADE IN AMERICA' signs behind him) with burned-in caption subtitles. Despite the immigration messaging, it is a raw, lightly-captioned speech with a long talking transcript and no music or cinematic montage treatment, so it is out of scope.
notable_text: Burned-in caption subtitles of the speech; podium reads 'PRESIDENT OF THE UNITED STATES'; audience signs 'MADE IN AMERICA'. Quote: "We stand and we ought to fight for you, not illegal alien criminals."
